parameters.query:
select c.id, c.phone, c.name, c.language, c.baby_dob,
  case
    when c.baby_dob = (now() - interval '3 months')::date then 'infant'
    when c.baby_dob = (now() - interval '12 months')::date then 'toddler'
  end as next_stage
from customers c
where c.whatsapp_opt_in and c.baby_dob is not null
  and (c.baby_dob = (now() - interval '3 months')::date
    or c.baby_dob = (now() - interval '12 months')::date)
  and (select count(*) from events s
       where s.type like 'whatsapp.promo%'
         and s.payload->>'phone' = c.phone
         and s.created_at > now() - interval '7 days') < 2

nodes.name: Babies reaching a milestone today (promo cap checked)

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ apiKey: $env.AISENSY_API_KEY, campaignName: $json.templateName, destination: $json.phone, userName: 'Rasi Mom & Baby', templateParams: $json.params }) }}

parameters.query: insert into events (type, payload) values ('whatsapp.promo_milestone_sent', jsonb_build_object('phone', '{{ $json.phone }}'))
